{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321132736D9440D61AB6EF531F377"}"},"total":176},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7604500340509967128","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的特别好。还没看完，忍不住来评价了，不知道为什么看的人那么少，清宫的一些规矩历史描写的非常细致入微，给人一种身临其境的感觉。40多了。30多年的老书虫了，能看进去的书太少了，也很少写书评，真的推荐"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770563069,"group_id":"7588633843444239385","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3FwNslGaZJa32FA9RAyl1M=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/83fafd89af78412f98931edec20dbdf7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776624088&x-signature=tGh0YI1DnvEJke5Y6knGmDRzPDE%3D","user_id":"242320523931092","user_name":"727微醺"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"242320523931092","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1696319134,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7588633843444239385","book_info":{"abstract":"我爸是皇帝，名叫玄烨……。
我妈是皇妃，封号德妃……。
我哥是皇子，排名第四……。
我跟我哥俩，相差十岁……。
使劲儿抱住哥的大腿：哥！弟儿这辈子，就靠你养活了嗷！
年大将军上前撕开紧搂着皇帝大腿不撒手的某人：乖！这辈子，我养活你就好。
